message.content: Add pagination support to the /api/users endpoint

content.text: I'll add pagination to the /api/users endpoint. Let me check the current implementation.
Simple implementation. I'll add limit/offset pagination with query params.
Now let me write a test for this.

content.content:
FAIL routes/users.test.ts
  GET /api/users
    ✗ should return paginated results
      TypeError: Cannot read property 'verify' of undefined
        at auth.middleware.ts:12:15

  0 passed, 1 failed

content.text: The auth middleware is intercepting the request. I need to mock the JWT verification in the test.

content.text: Pagination added and tests pass. Had to mock JWT before import — same pattern as before with auth tests.
